hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.json|*.css|*.md) [ -f node_modules/.bin/prettier ] && node_modules/.bin/prettier --write "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; esac; exit 0

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eq 'rm[[:space:]]+-[a-zA-Z]*f[a-zA-Z]*[[:space:]]+(/|~|\*|\.[[:space:]])|git[[:space:]]+push[[:space:]].*--force([^-]|$)|DROP[[:space:]]+TABLE|DROP[[:space:]]+DATABASE|git[[:space:]]+reset[[:space:]]+--hard|:\(\)\{'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"setup-ai guard: destructive command detected (rm -rf / force-push / DROP / reset --hard). Re-run manually if you really mean it."}'; fi; exit 0
